name: Sulforaphane
description: Sulforaphane is under investigation for the treatment of Autism Spectrum Disorder.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Sulforaphane.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Sulforaphane.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Sulforaphane.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Sulforaphane.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Sulforaphane.

interactions.description: Acetyldigitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Sulforaphane.
